sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12813" key="a)pokefa/lisma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποκεφᾰ´λ-ισμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n12813.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dirt that comes off the head,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:48" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.48</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
